## Executive Summary

The Houzz Browser Intelligence Layer has been fully designed and documented for the HCI AI Operating System. All 6 required workstream documents have been created in `/houzz/`, TASKS.md has been created with all 7 mandated backlog items, and PROJECT.md has been updated with the Houzz workstream.

This is a design-and-governance delivery. No code has been implemented. No Houzz system has been accessed. No application code has been modified. The workstream is ready for Sprint 1 implementation.

**Total files created:** 8 (6 in /houzz/ + TASKS.md + PROJECT.md update)  
**Application code modified:** 0  
**Existing governance files modified:** 0 (PROJECT.md appended only)  
**Duplicates created:** 0  
**Commit message:** `Add Houzz browser intelligence workstream`

## Constitutional Compliance Verification

| Requirement | Status |
|---|---|
| Read-only — no submit, edit, delete, message, or schedule changes | ✅ All documents enforce read-only |
| Core principle: Capture once, reuse everywhere | ✅ Defined in all 6 documents |
| Superintendent uses Houzz normally (no behavior change) | ✅ Enforced in workflow design |
| No write-back without approval gate | ✅ HZ-X1/X2/X3 prohibitions + full gate set |
| Application code not modified | ✅ Governance/documentation only |
| Existing governance files not duplicated | ✅ Extends, does not duplicate APPROVAL_GATES.md |
| Follows SPRINT_OPERATING_MODEL.md | ✅ All tasks assigned to sprints with acceptance criteria |
| HCI_AI_CONSTITUTION.md Article III compliance | ✅ Reads autonomous; all writes gated |
| Follows AI_TEAM_CHARTER.md agent roles | ✅ Browser Claude (read), ChatGPT (analysis), n8n (orchestration), Claude Code (commits) |

## Target Workflow — Implemented as Designed

| Step | Actor | System | Gate |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1. Superintendent uses Houzz normally | Superintendent | Houzz | None |
| 2. Houzz captures photos, weather, logs, labor, deliveries, schedule | Houzz | Houzz | None |
| 3. Browser Agent reads completed Houzz data | Browser Claude | Houzz (read-only) | HZ-R (no gate) |
| 4. HCI AI extracts structured intelligence | ChatGPT | HCI AI | None |
| 5. Executive summary, PM actions, schedule, procurement, risk, lessons learned, priorities | ChatGPT + n8n | Repository | None |
| 6. No write-back to Houzz without approval | n8n → Human | All systems | HZ-E1/E2, HZ-H1/H2, HZ-F1 |

## Approval Gates Defined

| Gate | Name | Status |

| HZ-R | Read | No approval required |
| HZ-E1 | Client Communication | Gate E extension |
| HZ-E2 | Client Update | Gate E extension |
| HZ-H1 | HubSpot Status Write | Gate H extension — most common |
| HZ-H2 | HubSpot Activity Write | Gate H extension |
| HZ-D1 | Drive Report File | Auto (AI folder) |
| HZ-D2 | Drive Client Deliverable | Gate H extension |
| HZ-F1 | Procurement Action | Gate F extension |
| HZ-S1 | Schedule Write-back | Gate E extension |
| HZ-X1 | Log Edit | PERMANENTLY PROHIBITED |
| HZ-X2 | Message Send | PERMANENTLY PROHIBITED |
| HZ-X3 | Record Delete | PERMANENTLY PROHIBITED |

---

## Intelligence Artifacts Defined (Per Daily Cycle)

For each active project, the daily intelligence package produces:
1. Executive Summary (5–7 sentences, owner-ready, health signal Green/Yellow/Red)
2. PM Action Items (numbered, specific, prioritized)
3. Schedule Impact Analysis (variance, milestone risk)
4. Procurement / Delivery Impact (missing deliveries, expedite recommendations)
5. Risk Alert Log (safety, quality, sub performance, weather, RFI conflicts)
6. Lessons Learned Candidates (for future project intelligence)
7. Tomorrow's Priorities (3–5 ranked priorities for morning huddle)

Plus at the portfolio level:
- Daily Executive Brief (all projects, 1-page summary)
- PM Action Item Roll-up (cross-project ranked list)

---

## Known Limitations (Documented)

| Limitation | Documented In | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| No official Houzz API | HOUZZ_READ_ONLY_AUDIT.md | Browser extraction |
| Requires active human session | HOUZZ_BROWSER_AGENT_STRATEGY.md | Human initiates; agent reads |
| Photo content needs vision AI for deep analysis | HOUZZ_BROWSER_AGENT_STRATEGY.md | Sprint 7 visual intelligence |
| Log must be submitted before extraction | HOUZZ_DAILY_LOG_WORKFLOW.md | Retry logic + morning fallback |
| Schedule detail may need export for full data | HOUZZ_READ_ONLY_AUDIT.md | Flag for export if needed |
